ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Name of the file containing the report */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table in the database where the report data is stored */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers where the report can be found */,
  "report_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the report (e.g., A for annual, Q for quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report (e.g., Respondent ID, Allowances, Formula Rates) */,
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the report_types table */,
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the file_formats table */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_types" (
  "report_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report type */,
  "report_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the report type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_formats" (
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file format */,
  "file_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the file format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file format */,
  "characteristics" TEXT /* Unique characteristics of the file format (e.g., page numbers, report frequencies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_report_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the financial_reports table */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user for the report (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "report_id")
)
